---
name: Pull request
about: Submit a contribution to BlankVisuals© Validator (FW-001)

## What does this PR do?
A clear description of the change and why it's needed.

## Type of change
- [ ] New rule or rule clarification
- [ ] New framework type
- [ ] New checklist or domain supplement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Other

## Rule or file affected
Which rule ID (e.g. `SEC-01`, `TOP-03`) or file this touches.

## Evidence or motivation
A concrete example, failing scenario, or real-world case that motivates this change.

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows existing formatting (Markdown, sentence case, rule table pattern)
- [ ] No AI-generated content submitted without human review
- [ ] Version bump noted in CHANGELOG.md if applicable
- [ ] `bash scripts/verify.sh` passes

## Additional context
Any other relevant detail.
